title: Per-client emitted config golden snapshots
description: After client narrowing (TASK-012) and Claude config rewrite (TASK-017), capture per-client config artifacts as golden snapshots. Catches future drift in emitted .mcp.json (Claude), .codex/codex.toml (Codex), .cursor/mcp.json (Cursor).
scope: Layer 2 P0 — regression net for emitted client configs

files.change: NEW: golden snapshot of .mcp.json output for Claude (after TASK-017)
NEW: per-client snapshot tests using vitest toMatchSnapshot

criteria: 4 golden snapshots committed for 3 clients (Claude has 2 scopes)
Snapshot tests pass against current emitted output
Failure message includes pnpm test -u hint
